enableMusicControls.name: Enable Music Controls
enableMusicControls.hint: Show music playback controls and the now-playing banner in the break room window. GM only setting.

breakPlaylist.name: Break Playlist
breakPlaylist.hint: Choose a playlist to play during breaks. Currently playing music will pause and resume after.

spectate.name: Allow Spectating
spectate.hint: When enabled, players can watch each other's minigames during breaks.

showOfflinePlayers.name: Show Offline Players
showOfflinePlayers.hint: Display offline players in the break room with a greyed-out card so you can see who hasn't connected yet.

startMinimized.name: Start Tavern Minimized
startMinimized.hint: When a break starts, show only the compact timer bar instead of the full window.

minimizeDuringActivity.name: Minimize During Activity
minimizeDuringActivity.hint: Minimize the break room window while playing a game or spectating, and restore it when the activity ends.

audioSettings.name: Sound Effects
audioSettings.label: Configure Sounds
audioSettings.hint: Choose custom audio files for break events.

playerSettings.name: Player Visibility
playerSettings.label: Configure Players
playerSettings.hint: Choose which players appear in the Tavern Patrons list during breaks.

gameSettings.name: Games Configuration
gameSettings.label: Configure Games
gameSettings.hint: Enable or disable the games tab and individual minigames.

audio.title: AFK Tavern - Sound Effects
audio.description: Customise the audio played during break events. Leave blank to use the default.

players.title: AFK Tavern - Player Visibility
players.description: Control which users appear in the Tavern Patrons list. Hidden players won't be tracked during breaks.
players.playerListHint: Uncheck a player to hide them from the tavern. Useful for spectator accounts or assistant GMs.

games.title: AFK Tavern - Games
games.description: Control which games are available in the break room.
games.enableGamesTabHint: When disabled, the games drawer tab is completely hidden from the break room.
games.gameListHint: Uncheck a game to hide it from the drawer. Disabled games cannot be launched.

soundBreakEnd.name: Break End
soundBreakEnd.hint: Played when a break ends or the timer runs out.

soundBreakNotify.name: Bell Notification
soundBreakNotify.hint: Played when the GM rings the bell.

timer.waiting: Waiting for the GM to start break...

lobby.label: Pre-Session Lobby
lobby.hint: Players join as Ready instead of Away. Use before a session to wait for everyone.

minigames.heading: Tavern Games
minigames.subtitle: Just for fun, no rewards here!
minigames.practiceNote: Just for fun, no rewards during break time!
minigames.comingSoonDesc: New minigames are in the works!

notifications.breakStarted: Break time! The AFK Tavern is now open.
notifications.lobbyStarted: Pre-session lobby is open! Waiting for players.
notifications.breakEnded: Break's over! Back to the adventure.
notifications.allBack: All players are back! Ready to resume.
notifications.allReady: All players are ready! Good to go.
notifications.duplicateTab: AFK Tavern is already open in another tab. Using multiple tabs may cause unexpected behaviour.

dialog.endEarlyContent: Not all players are back yet. End break anyway?
dialog.lobbyEndEarlyContent: Not all players are ready yet. Start the session anyway?
dialog.closeContent: A break is still running. Would you like to end it or just minimize the window?
dialog.confirmContent: A break is still running. Would you like to end it?
dialog.lobbyCloseContent: The pre-session lobby is still open. Would you like to start the session or just minimize the window?
dialog.lobbyConfirmContent: The pre-session lobby is still open. Would you like to start the session?

memoryMatch.title: Memory Match
memoryMatch.description: Flip cards and find matching pairs. Remember what you've seen to clear the board!

ticTacToe.title: Tic Tac Toe
ticTacToe.description: Challenge another player to a classic game of Tic Tac Toe!
ticTacToe.inviteMessage: challenges you to Tic Tac Toe!
ticTacToe.noPlayers: No other players online to challenge.
ticTacToe.busyWarning: This player is already in a game. They may not want to be disturbed.

connectFour.title: Connect Four
connectFour.description: Drop pieces to connect four in a row: horizontally, vertically, or diagonally!
connectFour.noPlayers: No other players online to challenge.
connectFour.busyWarning: This player is already in a game. They may not want to be disturbed.

spectate.ended: The game you were spectating has ended.
spectate.title: Spectating

whackAMole.title: Whack-a-Mole
whackAMole.description: Click targets as they pop up to score points. Hit the good ones, avoid the bad!

minesweeper.title: Minesweeper
minesweeper.description: Reveal tiles without hitting a mine. Use the numbers to deduce where the dangers are hiding. Right-click to flag.

simonSays.title: Simon Says
simonSays.description: Watch the colour sequence, then repeat it from memory. Each round adds another colour!

wordScramble.title: Word Scramble
wordScramble.description: Unscramble the letters to spell the hidden word. Use hints if you're stuck!

monsterHarvester.title: Monster Harvester
monsterHarvester.description: Harvest falling loot! Click items as they rain down. Avoid skulls, bombs, and frost traps! Try the full module for the real experience!
monsterHarvester.instructions: Items will rain down. Click to harvest them! Avoid hazards: skulls steal harvests, bombs obscure vision, frost freezes you.
monsterHarvester.hint: Click empty space = strike. Miss an item = strike. Don't run out!
